mapper.select: SELECT TOKEN_ID as tokenId, USER_ID as userId, TOKEN_VALUE as tokenValue, EXPIRY_DATE as expiryDate FROM REFRESH_TOKENS WHERE TOKEN_VALUE = #{tokenValue}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO REFRESH_TOKENS t USING DUAL ON (t.USER_ID = #{userId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TOKEN_VALUE = #{tokenValue}, EXPIRY_DATE = #{expiryDate} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TOKEN_ID, USER_ID, TOKEN_VALUE, EXPIRY_DATE) VALUES (SEQ_TOKEN_ID.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{tokenValue}, #{expiryDate})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM REFRESH_TOKENS WHERE TOKEN_VALUE = #{tokenValue} AND EXPIRY_DATE > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
SELECT u.EMAIL FROM REFRESH_TOKENS r JOIN USERS u ON r.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId}
